name: Svg.Editor

aliases.name: Text
aliases.comment: Type alias for textual data. Usually strings that are shown directly to the end user.

values.name: cmd
values.comment: Command to properly initialize the editor

values.name: defaulConfig
values.comment: Configuration object

values.name: editable
values.comment: Control if figure is editable or not

values.name: grow
values.comment: Re-scale figure by the given scaling factor

values.name: image
values.comment: Create an image with given width and source URL

values.name: init
values.comment: Init function in TEA

values.name: line
values.comment: Create a line from a list of vertices

values.name: move
values.comment: Move figure by the given vector displacement

values.name: point
values.comment:
Create a point at origin.

Use move to set its position.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscription function in TEA

values.name: text
values.comment: Create a text figure from string

values.name: update
values.comment: Update function in TEA
values.type: Svg.Editor.Config -> Svg.Editor.Msg -> Svg.Editor.Model -> ( Svg.Editor.Model, Platform.Cmd.Cmd Svg.Editor.Msg )

values.name: view
values.comment: View function in TEA

values.name: visible
values.comment: Control if figure is visible or not

values.name: withFigures
values.comment: Add list of figures to model

values.name: withLabel
values.comment: Set figure label

values.name: withStyle
values.comment: Add style to figure

name: Svg.Editor.Config

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: The config object. Usually should be created using init or the config utilitiy function

values.name: config
values.comment:
Create a custom config from a list of properties,
e.g.

    config
        [ groups [ "routes", "rock-faces", "elements" ]
        , pointRadius 2
        , controls { zoom = False, pan = True, drag = False }
        ]

values.name: controls
values.comment: Enable/disable zoom and pan controls in the UI
values.type: { zoom : Basics.Bool, pan : Basics.Bool, drag : Basics.Bool } -> Svg.Editor.Config.Config -> Svg.Editor.Config.Config

values.name: editable
values.comment: Control if editor is editable or not.

values.name: groups
values.comment:
List of allowed groups in scene.

Each element can be in at most a single group and have a unique index in that group.

This is useful, for instance, to mark routes or other highlights on the topo map and
have numbers identifying each element.

values.name: init
values.comment: Default config

values.name: pointRadius
values.comment: Radius of points, when rendered as circles.

values.name: readOnly
values.comment: Initialize editor in a read-only state if boolean is true.

values.name: sceneId
values.comment:
Change the default scene id.

This is necessary if two scenes are present in the same screen. Each scene must have a unique id.

values.name: shape
values.comment:
Initial shape, (width, height), of the viewing area.

Scale is in meters.
